sentences.arabic: حَجَزْتُ غُرْفَةً مُطِلَّةً عَلَى الْبَحْرِ فِي فُنْدُقٍ جَمِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Rezervisao sam sobu s pogledom na more u prelijepom hotelu.
sentences.translationEn: I booked a room overlooking the sea in a beautiful hotel.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا وَصَلْتُ، اسْتَقْبَلَنِي الْمُوَظَّفُ بِلُطْفٍ شَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Kada sam stigao, službenik me je dočekao veoma ljubazno.
sentences.translationEn: When I arrived, the staff member greeted me very kindly.

sentences.arabic: الْغُرْفَةُ وَاسِعَةٌ وَنَظِيفَةٌ، وَفِيهَا سَرِيرٌ مُرِيحٌ.
sentences.translation: Soba je prostrana i čista, i ima udoban krevet.
sentences.translationEn: The room is spacious and clean, and it has a comfortable bed.

sentences.arabic: يُوجَدُ مَطْعَمٌ كَبِيرٌ فِي الطَّابِقِ الْأَوَّلِ يُقَدِّمُ طَعَامًا لَذِيذًا.
sentences.translation: Na prvom spratu se nalazi veliki restoran koji služi ukusnu hranu.
sentences.translationEn: There is a large restaurant on the first floor that serves delicious food.

sentences.arabic: أَنَا سَعِيدٌ جِدًّا بِإِقَامَتِي فِي هَذَا الْمَكَانِ.
sentences.translation: Veoma sam sretan svojim boravkom na ovom mjestu.
sentences.translationEn: I am very happy with my stay in this place.
